# Parity Matrix

<!-- GENERATED by `swift run parity-tool render` from docs/parity-matrix.json. DO NOT EDIT. -->

| Capability | pure-Swift | RCL | Severity | Platforms | Type | latency | soak | correctness | resource | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| context.create | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_bridge.c:65 crcl_context_create (rcl_init_options_init + set_domain_id + rcl_init); Context.swift makeDefaultSession .rcl arm under #if SWIFT_ROS2_RCL; RclTransportSessionTests |
| node.create | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_bridge.c:101 crcl_node_create (rcl_node_init); RclClient.createNode:554; node creation works for N nodes — multi-node entity-binding tracked under node.multi |
| node.multi | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | RclTransportSession.swift:66 registerNode overwrites a single currentNode; preflightPublisher/Subscriber/ServiceEntity bind every entity to the last-registered node, so entities misroute under >1 node (wire path has no such ceiling) |
| publish.typed.sensor_msgs/Imu | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pass | pending | crcl_marshal_registry.c:24 Imu typesupport; Imu+RclMarshal.swift rclTypedPublish -> crcl_publish_imu; crcl-golden byte-parity (#121) |

Conduit uses CompressedImage |

| publish.serialized.non_bundled | supported | missing | blocker | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_bridge.c:122-130 crcl_publisher_create rejects any type absent from crcl_marshal_registry.c ('unsupported type'); the byte seam only selects a method on an already-created bundled publisher, so non-bundled types cannot open a publisher at all — blocks Conduit AudioData + CompressedPointCloud2 |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/Imu | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_subscription.c rcl_take_serialized_message -> (Data,UInt64) seam; Imu bundled in registry; Node.swift:110 CDRDecoder decode is identical across backends |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/Image | supported | missing | minor | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | pending | pending | pending | pending | raw Image not bundled; rcl_subscription.c:102-108 crcl_subscription_create is registry-gated -> 'unsupported type' for raw Image |
| subscribe.serialized.sensor_msgs/PointCloud2 | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | PointCloud2 bundled in registry; rcl_subscription.c serialized take + Node.swift CDRDecoder |
| subscribe.serialized.non_bundled | supported | missing | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | byte-seam-only | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_subscription.c:102-108 crcl_subscription_create is registry-gated -> 'unsupported type' for any type absent from crcl_marshal_registry.c; pure-Swift ROS2Subscription<M> decodes any CDRDecodable type |
| service.server | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_service.c crcl_service_create gated on crcl_srv_registry_lookup (12 bundled srv types, crcl_srv_registry.c); no byte-seam fallback for services. Wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType |
| service.client | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_client.c:135-143 crcl_client_create gated on the 12-entry srv registry; ROS2Client is generic over any service on the wire path |
| param.declare | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | backend-agnostic ParameterStore actor; declareParameter identical across backends |
| param.getset | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | ParameterStore get/set is backend-agnostic; served via bundled rcl_interfaces param services (crcl_srv_registry.c) on RCL |
| param.event | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | /parameter_events via installParameterEventEmitter + lazy ParameterEvent publisher (rcl_interfaces/msg/ParameterEvent bundled in crcl_marshal_registry.c) |
| action.server | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_action_server.c:212-220 crcl_action_server_create gated on crcl_action_registry_lookup; registry holds 1 entry (example_interfaces/action/Fibonacci). Wire path serves any action |
| action.client | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | bundled | pending | pending | pending | pending | rcl_action_client.c crcl_action_client_create gated on crcl_action_registry (CRCL_ACTION_REGISTRY_ENTRY_COUNT 1, Fibonacci only) |
| qos.profiles | supported | supported | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | makeCrclQoS maps reliability/durability/history/depth -> rmw_qos_profile; same knob set as pure-Swift TransportQoS (deadline/lifespan/liveliness absent on both = parity) |
| transport.dds | supported | partial | major | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | RCL rides rmw_cyclonedds (DDS wire works, integration-tested) but RclTransportSession.open reads only domainId; ddsDiscoveryMode/ddsUnicastPeers/ddsNetworkInterface are silently ignored — unicast/interface only via CYCLONEDDS_URI env var. Conduit exposes dds_discovery_mode/dds_unicast_peers |
| transport.zenoh | supported | partial | n-a-by-design | iOS/Catalyst/macOS/visionOS | n-a | pending | pending | pending | pending | RCL-over-Zenoh only via build-time SWIFT_ROS2_RCL_RMW=zenoh variant (CRos2JazzyZenoh, #128); TransportConfig.rcl takes no zenoh selector and the .zenoh API arm never routes through RCL (dropZenohWire carves out zenoh-pico) |
